## ShNodes.ShTestExprNode type

The union of concrete node types mvdan/sh's `syntax.TestExpr` interface can hold.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ShTestExprNode = ShBinaryTestNode | ShParenTestNode | ShUnaryTestNode | ShWordNode;
```
